commands.summary: Backend build passed with schema v23 device_keys registry and register/rotate/revoke methods.
Tests cover register/rotate/revoke, the v23 from-previous-shipped-schema upgrade, and operator-only device-key routes.
Local audit passed after AGH-025 implementation, decision 0016, and ledger updates.

environment.process_note: AGH-025: device-key registry (public-key refs, rotation, lost-device revocation) with private keys in OS-backed storage; audit chain guarantee stated honestly as local tamper-evidence (decision 0016).
